name: Triple Muffin Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a large bowl, stirring in the raisins until well mixed.
2. Store the mixture in an airtight ziplock bag or sealed Tupperware container in the refrigerator.
3. For six muffins: (double for 12)
a. In a separate bowl, whisk together 1 egg, 1/4 cup vegetable oil, and one of the following:
- 3/4 cup mashed bananas
- 3/4 cup applesauce mixed with 1/4 cup water
- 1/2 cup pumpkin mixed with 1/4 cup water
b. Stir in 1 and 1/2 cups of the dry mixture.
c. Grease a muffin pan and pour the batter into each cup.
d. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Note: We have also had good results using canned crushed pineapple.
